characters.name: "Big D"
characters.description: "Big D"was a player for theBayside High Schoolbasketball team. In order to help the team win,EddiekidnappedJefferson High School's mascot. Big D was skeptical, and was angered to see that the goat was not in the closet. Big D told Eddie that he needed to find the goat in time for the game, or else the loss would be his fault.

characters.name: Amber
characters.description: Amberwas a student atBayside High School. Amber met up withRavenandChelseain the hallway to invite them to her party. She pointed out that she and a handful of other students would be going with their dates and pointed out that Raven and Chelsea were dateless.

characters.name: Barbara
characters.description: Barbara(Julie Lancaster)isLarry's Mother. She only appeared in episodeGettin' Outta Dodge. Larry wanted to eat at Cory's house, since he did want to eat what his mother made for Lunch. Later Larry  got  interested in cooking with Cory's father, which made Cory Jealous. Cory decide to invite Barbara to his house, and began workout out with Cory. Larry heard music in the living room, he was surprised to see Cory workout out with his mother.

characters.name: Raven Baxter
characters.description: Raven BaxterThat's So RavenCory in the HouseGeneralFull nameRaven Lydia BaxterNickname(s)RaeGenderFemaleDate of BirthSeptember 10, 1987Age14-17Resides inSan Francisco, CaliforniaOccupationStudentSchoolBayside High SchoolAppearanceEye colorHazelHair colorJet Black/Light BrownHeight5' 2RelationshipsFamilyTanya Baxter(mother)Victor Baxter(father)Cory Baxter(younger brother)Vivian(maternal grandmother) )Betty Jane(cousin)Booker Baxter(son)Nia Baxter(daughter)RomancesDevon Carter(ex-boyfriend/ex-husband (Raven's Home)FriendsChelsea Daniels(best friend)Eddie Thomas(best friend)Devon Carter(close friend, ex-boyfriend)EnemiesAlana Rivera(high school bully)AffiliationsNoneProductionSeason (s)1, 2, 3, 4 (That's So Raven)First EpisodeMother DearestPortrayed byRaven-Symoné Raven Lydia Baxteroften referred to as "Rae", is the titular main protagonist and one of the main characters ofThat's So Raven.  She is a sassy, psychic and clumsy teenager. She has friends and a loving family, and she attendsBayside High School. Raven Baxter is well known for her fashion sense and style. She loves fashion so much that she even designs her own clothes and wants to become a fashion designer. Raven is African-American. Her eyes are brown and her hair color is usually jet black, although she experimented with it and turned her hair light brown.

characters.name: Betty Jane
characters.description: Betty Janeis Raven’s cousin. Her only appearances was inCountry Cousins. She and Raven played a lot when they were little. The like playing Bury Treasure when they were kids. But one day they were playing bury treasure they buried the family gravy boat, which then cause a feud between Betty's Family and Raven's family. Betty's family were accusedVictorof stealing the Gravy Boat. Raven showed Betty Jane a picture she found at home, which brought Raven and Betty Jane's idea of the two of them burring the Gravy boat. So Raven and Betty went and dug up what they buried. Raven then found the Gravy Boat, and Raven and Betty then found out they were the ones that too the gravy boat. After bring the Gravy Boat back inside Betty's house. The feud between Betty's Family and Raven's Family had ended. As ofSeason 5ofRaven's Home, Betty Jane has a daughter namesAlice, who moves withVictorto attend a school for geniuses inSan Francisco.

characters.name: Bianca
characters.description: Elijah  Ray  Sanders Bianca (Erica Rivera)is the leader girl ofAlana's former posse. She only appears in 2 episodes. Ever since Alana got kicked out of Bayside, Bianca took over her role as the mean girl. As Muffy put it, Bianca was “so bad, she got kicked out of military school.” Ever since she started going to Bayside, she immediately began to tormentRavenand her friends and family (even going so far as to follow her home and hit her dad with dodgeballs).

characters.name: Billy
characters.description: Billywas a classmate ofCory Baxter's. Corywas intimidated by Billy's extravagant birthday party and decided not to throw a big party.Raven, after having a vison that Cory would say that he hated her, decided to throw Cory the world's best birthday party in retaliation. Billy and his friendJaimecame to see for themselves. AfterTanyaandVictorgot sick from food poisoning, the trip to the zoo was cancelled and Billy tried to get everyone to go to his house. The kids stayed after hearing that ReptileRickwas coming.

characters.name: Miles Bonay
characters.description: Miles Bonaywas a friend ofCory Baxter's. Miles fell in love withRavenat first sight. He andCorybought a videotape to learn how to hypnotize, but in trying to hyponitize the girls, accidentally hypnotizedVictor Baxter. Victor fell into a trance minutes before he was to appear on live television and Miles refused to give the wake up word, which wasokechobee, until he got a kiss from Raven. Raven had him kiss a fish and Miles handed over the wake up word.

characters.name: Booker Baxter
characters.description: Booker BaxterGeneralFull nameBooker Baxter-CarterNickname(s)Book (By his friends)B, Future Boy (By Tess)Boo, Baby Boy (By Raven Baxter)BB (By Danni)B-DressingNoSalad (Fork-Knife Avatar)Booger (By Coach Spitz)Special Little Man (By Raven)GenderMaleDate of BirthNovember 9, 2005Age12 / 13 (season 1 Ravens home)13 / 14 (season 2 Ravens home)14 / 15 (season 3 Ravens home)15 / 16 (season 4 Ravens home)16 / 17 (season 5 Ravens home)Resides in419 Miranda Place, San Francisco, California (currently)Chicago, Illinois (formerly)OccupationStudentSchoolGeorge Washington Carver Community School (graduated)George Washington Carver Magnet High School (formerly)Bayside High School (Attending)AppearanceEye colorBrownHair colorBlackRelationshipsFamilyRaven Baxter(mother)Nia Baxter(twin sister)Devon Carter(father)Victor Baxter(maternal grandfather)Alice Baxter(First cousin once removed)Tanya Baxter(maternal grandmother)Cory Baxter(uncle)Nadine Carter(aunt)Maureen(great aunt)Chelsea Grayson(honorary aunt)Levi Grayson(honorary little brother)Elijah  Ray  SandersUncleRomancesDanni (ex-girlfriend)FriendsLevi Grayson (best friend)Tess O'MalleyRamonCurtisThe GuntzSiennaIsabellaNeilIvyFinn SawyerMatteo SilvaAva KingNoah LambertAlice BaxterElijah Ray  SandersEnemiesMitch MoseleyThe 3 Go's (formerly)AffiliationsThe Chi-LectiveRadio E-ClipsProductionSeason (s)1, 2, 3, 4, 5First EpisodeBaxter's Back!Portrayed byIssac Ryan Brown He is gullible, innocent, in no rush to grow up, and is an unapologetic mama's boy. He will not do something bad unless he is tricked into it, which is pretty easy to do, but will stand up for himself when he finally catches on to what is happening. He is also shown to be money hungry like his uncleCory. He also has a big head which he constantly gets stuck in random things, for example:

characters.name: Briggs
characters.description: Mr. Briggswas the manager of the restaurant whereVictor Baxterworked duringseason 1. WhenRavenhad a vision that Mr. Briggs was going to fire her father, she went to the restaurant to tell him that he was a great employee, which led to Mr. Briggs finding Raven annoying andVictorgetting into an argument with him, and ultimately, Victor getting fired. After seeing that Mr. Briggs was spineless around celebrities, Raven disguised herself as "Liz Anya", andEddieandChelseawere her entourage. Raven then demanded that Victor be rehired and Mr. Briggs almost did until Raven was uncovered.

characters.name: Kelly Bryant
characters.description: Kelly Bryantwas a field reporter forHello, San Francisco!. Kelly arrived at the Baxter home in hopes of interviewingVictor Baxterwhile he cooked. Unfortunately, Victor had been accidentally hypnotized byMiles Bonay. RavenandTanyatook Victor's motionless body and attempted to keep the show going, but it went worse than expected. Kelly cut to commercials and said if Victor was not awake by the time they got back, the would cut to "What not to Put in Your Garbage Disposal".

characters.name: Buffy
characters.description: Buffyis the younger sister ofMuffy. She was only seen in a few episodes, mainly as Sydney’s foil. It is implied that Buffy is to Sydney what Muffy is to Raven. She also has the same first name as Buffy Summers, the title character from the 1992 movie and 1997 TV series “Buffy the Vampire Slayer” (although unlike her namesake, she doesn’t hunt vampires, demons and the forces of darkness).

characters.name: Nadine Carter
characters.description: Nadine "Deeni" Carteris the bratty younger sister ofDevon Carter. Nadine is jealous of Raven because she doesn't want to share Devon with her. In order to get a date withDevon Carter,Ravenhad to take her little brotherCorybecause Devon was bringing Nadine to Pizza Pals. Nadine was immediately hostile towards Raven and Cory, but Devon didn't seem to notice. Nadine's instantly jealous of Raven after she shares a kiss with Devon and agreed to work with Cory to make Raven's life miserable.

characters.name: Catina
characters.description: Catinawas a student atBayside High School. She is portrayed by Haylie Duff, the older sister of Hilary Duff. Using his newfound psychic powers,Eddiesaved Catina's vase from breaking. Eddie decided not to hide his power from the word likeRaven, and Catina became his girlfriend. Later, after his powers left him, Catina broke up with him; despite this not even being at the end of the episode, she unfortunately doesn't reappear again in the episode, and even in the rest of the series is never mentioned again.

characters.name: Catina

characters.name: Chad
characters.description: Chadwas the main object of affection on the showTermiDate. Raven Baxter,Chelsea Daniels,Crystal, andClaudiaall vied for his affection on their first date atThe Chill Grill. He was uncomfortable around Crystal and Claudia, but was able to connect with Raven and Chelsea while dancing with them. Claudia and Crystal were eliminated. Raven and Chelsea hung onto a bar over tar pits as a tie breaker for the date with Chad, but wound up falling in together when they deemed their friendship more important.

characters.name: Chantel
characters.description: Chantel-Drew Sidora(Drew Sidora Jordan) is Eddie's girlfriend inSeason 3. She appeared in four episodes, with her last appearance being in the episodeSave the Last Dance. She is never seen again and/or mentioned in Season 4.  She has an incredible appetite and whenever she says she wants something expensive, Eddie brings out his wallet, pulling an unhappy face at the contents. Despite her big appetite, she stays slim.

characters.name: Chrissy Collins
characters.description: Chrissy Collinsis an actress who goes to the same school as Ally, she is very annoying and Ally comes to dealing with it forever. Chrissy was seen by only time in the episodeGoin' Hollywood, she is played bySkyler Samuels.

characters.name: Cindy
characters.description: She and Cory thought that since they were going to different junior high schools, they should "see other people", and she started dating another boy (Tyler), while Cory went out with another girl (Brittany). However, Cory and Cindy quickly got back together when their separate relationships did not work out. In the episodeWhere There's Smoke, Cory finds out that Cindy smokes, but at the end of the episode, she quit. Best  Friend  of Elijah Ray Sanders

characters.name: Claudia
characters.description: Claudiawas a contestant onTermiDate. Claudia, along withCrystal,Raven, andChelsea, vied for the affection ofChad. She got into a catfight with Crystal at theChill Grill. She was the one who was most in love with Chad, but then changed her mind when she was eliminated (having to take what was called the “Walk of Shame”).
